title: 10 Pcs 24inches Bobo Balloons, Bubble Transparent Balloons Clear Round Crystal Balloon Fillable Clear Balloon for Photo Shoot DIY Party Wedding Anniversary Festival Romantic Decora
features: 🎈【What you receive】🎈There are 10 pcs 24 inch wave balloons in this package. Note: These transparent bubble balloons do not contain sticks, confetti, feathers, ribbons, or LED lights.
🎈【DIY Delicate BOBO Balloon】🎈You can add any desired small accessories, such as feathers, decals, confetti, sequins, etc., to decorate the balloon.

🎈【Durable Material】🎈BOBO Balloons are made of PVC material, which is safe and durable. Before inflation, it is necessary to forcefully pull the balloon to make it more round and have a clear shape. The circular design will meet your decoration needs for different occasions.
🎈【Pre Stretched Balloons】🎈Before inflating the bobo balloon, it needs to be forcefully pulled and then inflated. Kind reminder: A professional pump is required.
💗【Hassle free purchase polic】💗Customer satisfaction is our first goal, you can feel free contact us if you have any questions.
description: Perfect decoration,holds for up to 72 hours Widely Application: Bobo balloons decorations for galas, weddings, bridal showers, graduation, christmas, spring festival, engagement parties, anniversaries, new years eve, wedding, birthday party, hen party and so on. Perfect table center pieces, wall decor, displays, photo, makes your party attractive and romantic.Great for indoor and outdoor use. Attentions： Please blow up to 90% Size, you can inflate them with helium tank, electric air inflator or hand pump. Don't try blowing them up with your mouth. Keep away from fire, Prohibit the use of hydrogen gas.
